changes: Promoted all HILLS/COLVAR/Kernels to [present] — full-data self-contained pseudoSpore
Added Module 01 COLVAR (500K frames) for complete zero-trust FES re-derivation
Added receipts/environment.toml with [hardware]+[software] for litho ingest compatibility
Module 08 status: PROPOSED -> SKIP (roadmap document, not computational result)
Added [external_braids] to data.toml: PDB:2D24, PLUMED-NEST:24.020/24.029/25.007, CHARMM36
data.toml uses [present]/[external] split for tarball vs lithoSpore braids
Updated index_map.toml rosetta_stone with proper braid URIs
Added nest-validate guidestone deploy subcommand for fully agentic pipeline
Fixed PDB 2D24 resolution: 1.41 -> 1.85 Å (sourced from PDB REMARK 2)
Corrected catalytic itinerary to match paper: two-fold (2SO→[2,5B]‡→5S1 and 1S3→[4H3]‡→4C1)

primary_paper.citation: Iglesias-Fernández J, Raich L, Ardèvol A, Rovira C. The complete conformational free energy landscape of β-xylose reveals a two-fold catalytic itinerary for β-xylanases. Chem Sci. 2015;6(2):1167-1177.

metadynamics_method.citation: Barducci A, Bussi G, Parrinello M. Well-tempered metadynamics: a smoothly converging and tunable free-energy method. Phys Rev Lett. 2008;100(2):020603.

opes_method.citation: Invernizzi M, Parrinello M. Rethinking Metadynamics: From Bias Potentials to Probability Distributions. J Phys Chem Lett. 2020;11(7):2731-2736.

grothaus_2022.citation: Grothaus IL, Bussi G, Colombi Ciacchi L. N-Glycan Conformer Distributions in Atomistic Simulation. J Chem Inf Model. 2022;62:4992-5008.

grothaus_2025.citation: Grothaus IL et al. (2025). Carbohydrate-active enzyme glycan puckering via REST-RECT.
grothaus_2025.note: Listed as unpublished on PLUMED-NEST as of May 2026

nin_hill_thesis.citation: Nin-Hill A. (2020) PhD thesis, Rovira group, University of Barcelona. Ch.3: QM/MM + metadynamics FEL methodology for glycoside hydrolases.

alonso_gil_thesis.citation: Alonso-Gil S. (2019) PhD thesis, Rovira group. Ch.2.2-2.4: PBE DFT equations for carbohydrate QM/MM.

charmm36_carbohydrate.citation: Guvench O et al. CHARMM additive all-atom force field for carbohydrate derivatives and its utility in polysaccharide and carbohydrate-protein modeling. J Chem Theory Comput. 2011;7(10):3162-3180.

cremer_pople.citation: Cremer D, Pople JA. General definition of ring puckering coordinates. J Am Chem Soc. 1975;97(6):1354-1358.

pdb.title: Crystal structure of ES complex of catalytic-site mutant xylanase from Streptomyces olivaceoviridis E-86

plumed_nest.description: Alanine dipeptide well-tempered metadynamics (method validation control)
Chignolin CLN025 OPES folding (method validation control)
CAZyme glycan puckering REST-RECT + steered (direct validation standard)

force_field.name: CHARMM36-jul2022
force_field.note: Validated for hexopyranose ring puckering. Grothaus 2022/2025 also use CHARMM36+GROMACS, making results directly comparable.
